description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a sharply pointed nose and a dark, metallic finish. Its most distinctive elements are the extremely tall, vertical wing structures that extend well above and below the main body, giving it a dramatic, almost menacing silhouette. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a faceted canopy, suggesting a single-pilot configuration. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with no visible traditional horizontal stabilizers, and the tail section is integrated into the main body with twin vertical stabilizers. The surface appears smooth and reflective, with subtle blue accents along the wing roots and engine areas. No visible landing gear is present, and the design suggests a futuristic or advanced military or sci-fi aircraft.
description: A sleek, dark airplane with tall, vertical swept wings, a pointed nose, and a faceted front canopy. Blue accents and twin vertical stabilizers give it a futuristic, aggressive appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, tall vertical wings, and the angular cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, swept-back wings, and the blue accent details near the wing roots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin vertical stabilizers and the integrated tail section, with the wings extending vertically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same elongated body, wing sweep, and blue accents.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with extremely tall, vertical, swept-back wings and twin vertical stabilizers; no visible horizontal stabilizers; distinctive angular design.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail configuration integrated into the main body, with no separate horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a faceted canopy.
